text.title: Key Trends Summary 2025-2026 Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Key Trends Summary 2025-2026 application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Report MUST cover exactly the 6 named trends; fewer is incomplete, more dilutes.
rule.rationale: 6 trends is the orientation floor for 2025-2026 SDD work.

rule.statement: Report MUST be re-loaded every 90 days; older loads expire.
rule.rationale: AI-adjacent trends shift faster than annual cadence.

rule.statement: Report MUST be loaded once per planning session, not per task.
Each trend MUST cite ≥1 external source (vendor blog, CNCF report, big-tech doc).
rule.rationale: Un-cited trends become hearsay within a quarter.

rule.statement: Each trend MUST state ≥1 implication for the operator's current architecture.
